summary: Re-audit after coder v2 fixes. All 4 v1 findings are resolved. If.Run() and Compare.Run() now wrap evaluator calls in try/catch for NotSupportedException, ArgumentException, and OverflowException, returning Data.FromError with rich ValidationError diagnostics. WiderNumericType fallback changed from byte (index 0) to decimal (index length-1). Non-IComparable types in Compare() now throw ArgumentException instead of returning 0. 7 new tests cover all new code paths with strong assertions (Error.Key, Error.Message content). No new findings.
